metadata.summary: Administrative commands, PM orders, ministerial directives

definition.core_system: Executive Orders (PM) and Ministerial Directives (Ministers) provide operational commands within approved mandates. Must align with parliamentary decisions, constitutional principles, IAS briefs
definition.requirements: Require ≥80% constitutional compliance and full MCP documentation
limitations: Cannot bypass Parliament for strategic decisions

powers.pm_orders: Government-wide directives, multi-minister coordination, priority realignment, emergency implementation, resource reallocation within budget
powers.ministerial: Portfolio-specific commands, task delegation, technical decisions, implementation approaches, team coordination
powers.enforcement: Binding unless unconstitutional, Shadow Cabinet may challenge, Chief Justice may veto, Parliament may override (≥95%)

executive_order: 1. Prepare: PM identifies need, consult IAS Cabinet Secretary, verify constitutional compliance, check parliamentary alignment
2. Document: Write systemPatterns.json {executive_order_id, title, issued_by, issued_at, scope, directive, constitutional_basis, parliamentary_mandate, duration, mcp_trail[]}
3. Communicate: Notify ministers via activeContext, Shadow Cabinet copy, Chief Justice reviews, IAS archives in memory.json
4. Execute: Ministers implement (0-99%), track in activeContext, IAS monitors, report to PM
ministerial_directive: 1. Prepare: Minister identifies need, consult IAS, ensure PM alignment, verify EMD/quality
2. Document: Update activeContext {ministerial_directive_id, issued_by, directive, scope, rationale, pattern_ref}
3. Execute: Team follows, pattern applied, +10 RL compliance, log in progress.json
challenges: 1. Shadow: File mistakes.json (constitutional violation OR poor judgment), demand review/revision
2. PM Response: Defend with evidence OR amend OR withdraw
3. Escalate: IF unresolved→Parliament debate, consensus vote. IF <85%→rescinded, lesson in systemPatterns

violations.remediation: Demonstrate authority limits understanding, issue 10 compliant orders, 100% constitutional alignment, PM and Chief Justice approval
